verb.frequency: Oxford English Corpus 빈도 상위 (회화·문어 핵심)

meanings.example: I made a summary report for the audit team.
She would make a great compliance officer.
meanings.exampleKo: 그녀는 훌륭한 컴플라이언스 담당자가 될 거예요.

chunks.example: We need to make a decision on this merchant by tomorrow.
Make sure all KYC documents are verified.
These transaction patterns don't make sense.
We're making good progress on the cleanup project.
Strong AML controls make a real difference.

pronTip.title: MAKE 동사 발음 핵심
points: make sure [메익슈얼] — k+s 연음, sh 소리로!
강세: I MADE a decision (made에 강세)

listening.title: AML 의사결정 회의 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: We need to make a decision on this case today. Staff: I made a summary of all the red flags. The pattern doesn't make sense. Manager: What made you suspicious initially? Staff: The volume increase. Make sure we document everything. Manager: Good. We're making progress, and this kind of analysis makes a real difference.

blanks.suffix: a summary of all the red flags.
, and this kind of analysis makes a real difference.

examples5.label: 작성
examples5.en: I made a checklist for tomorrow's audit visit.
examples5.ko: 내일 감사 방문을 위한 체크리스트를 만들었어요.

examples5.label: 결정
examples5.en: Let's make a decision on the new vendor by Friday.
examples5.ko: 금요일까지 새 벤더에 대한 결정을 내립시다.

examples5.label: 확인
examples5.en: Make sure all PEP screenings are documented.
examples5.ko: 모든 PEP 스크리닝이 문서화됐는지 반드시 확인하세요.

examples5.label: 이치
examples5.en: These flagged transactions don't make sense as legitimate business.
examples5.ko: 이 신고된 거래들은 정상 비즈니스로는 말이 안 돼요.

examples5.label: 영향
examples5.en: Our team's work is making a real difference in fraud detection.
examples5.ko: 우리 팀의 업무는 사기 탐지에 실질적인 차이를 만들고 있어요.

writing5.en: I made a summary report for the audit team.

writing5.ko: 내일까지 이 가맹점에 대한 결정을 내려야 합니다.
writing5.en: We need to make a decision on this merchant by tomorrow.

writing5.ko: 모든 KYC 서류가 검증됐는지 반드시 확인하세요.
writing5.en: Make sure all KYC documents are verified.

writing5.ko: 이 거래 패턴은 말이 안 돼요.
writing5.en: These transaction patterns don't make sense.

writing5.ko: 정리 프로젝트에서 좋은 진전을 보이고 있어요.
writing5.en: We're making good progress on the cleanup project.

challenge3sec.en: We need to make a decision.

freewrite.situation: 최근 본인 팀이 내린 중요한 컴플라이언스 의사결정에 대해 영어로 설명하세요. 어떤 분석을 했고, 무엇을 확인했고, 어떤 차이를 만들었는지 MAKE 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: make a decision, make sure, make sense, make progress, make a difference
freewrite.placeholder: 예: Last month our team had to make a difficult decision about offboarding a long-term merchant. The transaction patterns simply didn't make sense anymore...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
의사결정, 검토 확인, 진행 보고 — MAKE 동사가 결정·확인의 핵심!

dialog.text: Have we made a decision on the new screening vendor?
Not yet. I'll make sure to finalize it this week.
Good. The current setup doesn't make sense anymore.
Are we making progress on the merchant cleanup?
Yes, we've made significant progress this quarter.
That makes a big difference for our risk profile.
I've made a draft of our Q3 priorities. The current process doesn't make sense for our scale.
What changes are you proposing?
First, make sure we automate the screening. Second, we need to make a decision on the offshore data clause.
Will this really make a difference?
It will. We'd cut review time by 40% and make real progress on the backlog.
Let's make sure we have buy-in from operations before finalizing.

rolePlay.scenario: 분기 컴플라이언스 전략 회의에서 본인이 제안하는 프로세스 개선안을 본부장에게 설득하세요. 현재 문제점, 결정이 필요한 사항, 기대 효과를 MAKE 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Alright, you've got 15 minutes. Walk me through what you want to change, what decision you need from me, and how this is going to make a real difference.

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
안내, 확인 요청, 진행 보고 — 격식 갖춘 MAKE 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, please make sure the report is reviewed before submission.
Will do. I'll make a final check this afternoon.
Thanks. That makes my day easier.
Have you made a decision on our proposal?
Yes, we've made our decision. I'll send the formal response today.
Great. Looking forward to it.
We need clarification on the decisions made during Q1 cleanup.
Thank you. We made our decisions based on a tiered risk framework — let me explain.
First, we made sure each merchant was scored against our updated risk matrix.
Did the new matrix make a meaningful difference compared to the old one?
It did. We made progress in identifying 30% more high-risk cases that previously didn't make sense to flag.
Understood. Please make sure the methodology document is shared by Friday.

rolePlay.scenario: 외부 감사인이 본인 팀의 Q1 컴플라이언스 의사결정에 대한 추가 자료를 이메일로 요청했습니다. 어떤 결정을, 어떤 근거로, 어떤 효과를 보고 내렸는지 MAKE 동사로 명확히 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Following our on-site visit, we'd like clarification on the offboarding decisions made in Q1. Please walk us through the rationale and confirm how you made sure each decision was properly documented.

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
STR 결정, 패턴 분석, 문서 확인 — MAKE 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: Have you made a decision on whether to file?
Yes. The volume pattern doesn't make sense — I'm filing.
Good. Make sure to document the rationale.
What made you flag this account?
Three transactions made no sense given the merchant's stated business.
That's a clear basis. Make sure it's in the case file.
Walk me through how the team made the decision to file this STR.
We made the decision based on three factors. First, the transaction velocity made no sense for the merchant's stated business model.
And the second factor?
The counterparty network. I made a relationship map and it showed clear layering signs.
Did the data make a clear case?
It did. We made sure to cross-reference with sanctions lists and watchlists before filing.
Strong analysis. This kind of work makes a real difference for our investigations.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU 검사관이 본인 팀의 STR 의사결정 프로세스에 대한 심층 인터뷰를 진행합니다. 어떤 분석으로, 어떤 근거로, 어떤 검증을 거쳐 결정을 내렸는지 MAKE 동사로 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Today I'd like to focus on decision-making. For the case 2026-0419, walk me through how your team made the decision to file, what you did to make sure the analysis was sound, and what made you confident in the conclusion.

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
의견 교환, 업계 영향 토론, 의사결정 공유 — 부드러운 MAKE 동사!

dialog.text: Your panel made a lot of sense to me.
Thanks! I tried to make a few practical points.
It made a real difference compared to the usual theoretical talks.
Has Korea made progress on FATF recommendations?
We've made significant progress, but there's still work to do.
Same in Singapore. We need to make sure the gaps close fast.
How do Korean PGs make decisions on offboarding high-risk merchants?
We've made our framework more data-driven recently. The old gut-feel approach didn't make sense at our scale.
Did the change make a measurable difference?
Definitely. We've made about 40% faster decisions, with fewer reversals.
That's impressive. What made you push for the change?
Honestly, the regulatory pressure. But it made our team's work more meaningful.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스 자리에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 리더와 각국 의사결정 프레임워크에 대해 깊이 있게 의견을 교환하세요. 본인 회사의 변화, 결정 기준, 효과를 MAKE 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Anjali, Head of Compliance at a major Indian PG
rolePlay.aiOpening: I really enjoyed your session. We're trying to make our offboarding framework more rigorous and your approach made a lot of sense. Mind sharing more about how you made the shift?

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
결정, 식사 준비, 가족 약속 — 가장 친숙한 MAKE 동사 패턴!

dialog.text: Have you made a decision about the trip?
Not yet. Let me make sure I can take Friday off first.
Sure, take your time.
Did you make dinner already?
I made pasta. Want to grab a plate?
That makes my day. Thanks!
Are you making time for yourself with the new baby?
Honestly, not as much as I should. But we made a rule — Sundays are family-only.
That makes sense. Routines really make a difference.
They do. We're making slow progress in finding our rhythm.
Make sure you and your spouse take turns to rest.
We try. It makes all the difference when we do.

rolePlay.scenario: 친구와 카페에서 만나 최근 가족 변화, 일상의 결정, 잘 지내고 있는지에 대해 자연스럽게 대화하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Yuki, a close friend you haven't seen in months
rolePlay.aiOpening: Long time no see! How have you been making it work with the baby and full-time work? Have you made any big changes lately?
